customer_complaint: Customer submitted re-KYC documents 11 days ago but the account remains frozen.
investigation_findings: Documents received but verification queue SLA breached; PAN and Aadhaar XML validated successfully on review.
resolution: Verification completed same day on escalation; unfreeze processed and an apology with timeline explanation sent.

customer_complaint: Customer expected 5x promotional points on dining spends but received the standard rate.
investigation_findings: Transaction posted under an excluded MCC (wallet load); no points accrue per the exclusion list.
resolution: Points reinstated and the statement credit re-processed within 7 working days.

customer_complaint: Customer received OTP and transaction alerts at 02:31 AM for purchases they did not make, totalling ₹45,363.
investigation_findings: Pattern matches card-testing: two sub-₹100 charges followed by high-value attempts at GLOBALTECH-STORE. Final attempt auto-declined by the fraud rule engine.
resolution: Reported within 3 working days — zero liability applied. Shadow credit of ₹45,363 posted within 10 working days and made permanent; card reissued with new number and tokens reset.

customer_complaint: Customer requested EMI conversion for ₹25,209 at Amazon but the full amount appeared in the bill.
investigation_findings: EMI ledger verified; foreclosure charge of 3% on outstanding principal correctly applied per policy.
resolution: Fee explained with the recorded consent log; one-time goodwill waiver of ₹500 applied under delegated limit.

customer_complaint: Customer lost their wallet in Jaipur and wants the card blocked immediately.
investigation_findings: Card hotlisted within 22 minutes of the call; last 72 hours of transactions reviewed with the customer — all recognized.
resolution: Replacement issued; fraud case resolved with zero liability as the report was within 3 working days. FIR copy archived.

customer_complaint: Customer reports card misused after a phishing call; a transaction of ₹78,490 went through before they could block the card.
investigation_findings: Card blocked on report. Device fingerprint and IP for the disputed transactions do not match the customer's known devices; 3-D Secure was bypassed via compromised OTP delivery. Vector classified as card-not-present fraud.
resolution: Fraud confirmed; network chargeback with fraud reason code recovered the amount. Customer refunded and enrolled in transaction-limit alerts.

customer_complaint: Customer wants to close their card as they have switched to another bank.
investigation_findings: Active EMI with outstanding principal of ₹29,688; closure blocked until foreclosure per policy.
resolution: Points redeemed as statement credit; closure completed within 7 working days with confirmation and bureau update scheduled.

customer_complaint: Customer's card was declined at Uber for ₹12,485 despite available limit.
investigation_findings: Decline code SUSPECTED_FRAUD_BLOCK placed by the rule engine after an unusual-merchant pattern; referred to Fraud Operations and cleared as false positive.
resolution: Explained the available-limit computation to the customer; payment succeeded after partial bill payment. Closed with decline category recorded.

customer_complaint: Customer requested EMI conversion for ₹30,671 at Croma but the full amount appeared in the bill.
investigation_findings: Transaction eligible: above ₹2,500, within 30 days, account current, category not excluded. Quoted 14% p.a. with 1% processing fee.
resolution: Interest adjustment posted for the overlap period and billing corrected via Disputes Operations; EMI schedule regenerated.

customer_complaint: Customer says a series of small charges followed by a large ₹36,629 debit appeared overnight from unknown merchants.
investigation_findings: Geolocation of disputed transactions inconsistent with customer location; merchant descriptors match a known fraud cluster under CPP review.
resolution: Customer-induced OTP sharing established for one transaction; partial liability applied per the board-approved matrix, remaining amount refunded. Card reissued.

customer_complaint: Customer wants to update their address after relocating to Delhi.
investigation_findings: New address OVD (Aadhaar) verified; minor name-format mismatch self-certified per policy.
resolution: KYC verified and card unfrozen within 1 working day; next re-KYC due date communicated.

customer_complaint: Customer received OTP and transaction alerts at 01:25 AM for purchases they did not make, totalling ₹76,388.
investigation_findings: Pattern matches card-testing: two sub-₹100 charges followed by high-value attempts at GLOBALTECH-STORE. Final attempt auto-declined by the fraud rule engine.
resolution: Customer-induced OTP sharing established for one transaction; partial liability applied per the board-approved matrix, remaining amount refunded. Card reissued.

customer_complaint: Customer reports an unauthorized online transaction of ₹22,704 at PRIMEGIFT-CARDS; card was in their possession.
investigation_findings: Geolocation of disputed transactions inconsistent with customer location; merchant descriptors match a known fraud cluster under CPP review.
resolution: Reported within 3 working days — zero liability applied. Shadow credit of ₹22,704 posted within 10 working days and made permanent; card reissued with new number and tokens reset.

customer_complaint: Customer disputes expiry of 14000 points without notice.
investigation_findings: Points expired on the 24-month FIFO schedule; expiry reminders were sent 60 and 30 days prior to the registered email.
resolution: Campaign rule explained; bonus points for post-registration spends credited correctly.

customer_complaint: Customer's card was declined at Reliance Digital for ₹63,246 despite available limit.
investigation_findings: Decline code SUSPECTED_FRAUD_BLOCK placed by the rule engine after an unusual-merchant pattern; referred to Fraud Operations and cleared as false positive.
resolution: International usage enabled with customer consent and channel limits set; retry succeeded.

customer_complaint: Customer says the BigBasket payment page timed out, they retried, and both attempts of ₹34,592 were charged.
investigation_findings: Both transactions settled; gateway logs confirm a timeout-and-retry sequence. Merchant order system shows a single fulfilled order.
resolution: Merchant confirmed duplicate processing; duplicate amount of ₹34,592 reversed to the card. Customer notified and case closed as Duplicate Reversed.

customer_complaint: Customer wants to close their card as they have switched to another bank.
investigation_findings: Active EMI with outstanding principal of ₹13,934; closure blocked until foreclosure per policy.

customer_complaint: Customer disputes a second ₹50,075 charge from Flipkart; merchant app shows only one confirmed order.
investigation_findings: Transaction pair matched on amount, merchant, and auth code lineage; second auth was a gateway resubmission, not a separate purchase.
resolution: Duplicate reversed within SLA; customer advised on auto-reversal timelines for pending authorizations.

customer_complaint: Customer's card declined three times at a POS terminal; worried the card is blocked.
investigation_findings: Authorization log shows decline code INSUFFICIENT_CREDIT_LIMIT; unbilled EMI conversion had reduced available limit below the transaction amount.
resolution: Identity re-verified and PIN counter reset; customer completed a verification transaction successfully.

customer_complaint: Customer says a series of small charges followed by a large ₹31,883 debit appeared overnight from unknown merchants.
investigation_findings: Geolocation of disputed transactions inconsistent with customer location; merchant descriptors match a known fraud cluster under CPP review.
resolution: Customer-induced OTP sharing established for one transaction; partial liability applied per the board-approved matrix, remaining amount refunded. Card reissued.

customer_complaint: Customer wants to close their card as they have switched to another bank.
investigation_findings: Zero outstanding verified including unbilled; no active EMIs; reward balance of 12500 points pending redemption.
resolution: Points redeemed as statement credit; closure completed within 7 working days with confirmation and bureau update scheduled.

customer_complaint: Customer disputes a second ₹48,472 charge from Zomato; merchant app shows only one confirmed order.
investigation_findings: Transaction pair matched on amount, merchant, and auth code lineage; second auth was a gateway resubmission, not a separate purchase.
resolution: Merchant unresponsive within 5 working days; chargeback raised with duplicate-processing reason code and shadow credit posted. Credit made permanent after no representment.

customer_complaint: Customer's video-KYC session failed twice and they are unsure how to proceed.
investigation_findings: V-CIP failures caused by poor lighting and document glare; assisted verification scheduled.
resolution: Address updated and CKYC registry refreshed within 7 working days; confirmation issued.

customer_complaint: Customer received OTP and transaction alerts at 03:11 AM for purchases they did not make, totalling ₹80,493.
investigation_findings: Geolocation of disputed transactions inconsistent with customer location; merchant descriptors match a known fraud cluster under CPP review.
resolution: Reported within 3 working days — zero liability applied. Shadow credit of ₹80,493 posted within 10 working days and made permanent; card reissued with new number and tokens reset.

customer_complaint: Customer submitted re-KYC documents 14 days ago but the account remains frozen.
investigation_findings: Periodic re-KYC lapsed after three notices; freeze applied per policy. Customer completed V-CIP during the call.
resolution: Verification completed same day on escalation; unfreeze processed and an apology with timeline explanation sent.

customer_complaint: Customer misplaced their card at home and asks about options short of permanent blocking.
investigation_findings: Hotlisted immediately; one post-loss attempt of ₹60,984 was auto-declined. Parallel fraud case opened for an earlier ₹18,234 transaction the customer did not recognize.
resolution: Customer located the card and unfroze it via the app; case closed with freeze/unfreeze guidance shared.

customer_complaint: Customer reports card misused after a phishing call; a transaction of ₹3,531 went through before they could block the card.
investigation_findings: Pattern matches card-testing: two sub-₹100 charges followed by high-value attempts at QUICKPAY-GATEWAY. Final attempt auto-declined by the fraud rule engine.
resolution: Reported within 3 working days — zero liability applied. Shadow credit of ₹3,531 posted within 10 working days and made permanent; card reissued with new number and tokens reset.

customer_complaint: Customer's redemption of 14500 points failed at checkout but points were deducted.
investigation_findings: Transaction posted under an excluded MCC (wallet load); no points accrue per the exclusion list.
resolution: Campaign rule explained; bonus points for post-registration spends credited correctly.

customer_complaint: Customer noticed two identical Uber debits of ₹73,211 minutes apart on the card statement and wants one reversed.
investigation_findings: Transaction pair matched on amount, merchant, and auth code lineage; second auth was a gateway resubmission, not a separate purchase.
resolution: Duplicate reversed within SLA; customer advised on auto-reversal timelines for pending authorizations.

customer_complaint: Customer disputes a second ₹7,499 charge from Ola; merchant app shows only one confirmed order.
investigation_findings: Both transactions settled; gateway logs confirm a timeout-and-retry sequence. Merchant order system shows a single fulfilled order.
resolution: Duplicate reversed within SLA; customer advised on auto-reversal timelines for pending authorizations.
